name: Review Requester
description: Request a review from a customer via email 2 days after their booking completes, with an SMS reminder 5 days after the email.

args.subject: Thanks for coming in — how was your visit?
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

Thanks for coming in to Bright Smile Dental. We hope the visit felt calm and easy — that's always what we're aiming for.

If you have a minute, we'd really appreciate a short review on Yelp. Honest feedback helps other folks who are nervous about the dentist find us and know what to expect:

https://www.yelp.com/writeareview/biz/bright-smile-dental

And if anything didn't sit right, just hit reply — we'd rather hear it from you directly so we can make it right.

Thanks again,
The Bright Smile Dental team

Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — just a quick nudge in case our email got buried. If you have 30 seconds, a short Yelp review would mean a lot: https://www.yelp.com/writeareview/biz/bright-smile-dental

args.subject: Review Requester agent sequence complete
args.body: Sent review request email + SMS reminder. Review destination: https://www.yelp.com/writeareview/biz/bright-smile-dental. NOTE: reminder fired unconditionally — v1 has no review.submitted event; check the configured review URL manually to see if this customer responded.
